title: selago whyteana
intro: Selago whyteana is a flowering plant species within the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the Cape gentian. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Selago whyteana are attributed to its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
